name: @arcproof/example-defi-diligence-agent
description: Proves @arcproof/sdk works for the ORIGINAL DeFi treasury-diligence vertical too, not just the new lending-apr-agent example: the same real onchain-agent-v1/news-agent-v1/compliance-agent-v1 specialists (same tools, same prompts, same claim types) and the same deterministic verification rules as the reference apps, ported onto the generalized SDK.
